title: Specialization
description: Character specialization (skill focus). Mirrors §04 §2.2 specializations and the 24-spec MVP quota (§09).

primary_skill.description: Primary skill axis this specialization advances.

bonus.description: Stat modifiers applied when the specialization is active. Keys are stat names; values are signed numbers.

trigger_event_tags.description: Event tags that activate this specialization's bonus.
